prompt: The payment search function is a hot path (called on every page load of the payments list). The team wants to know if pre-indexing by contrato_id would be faster than the current linear scan. Benchmark it.
assertions: A criterion benchmark file is produced testing both linear scan and indexed approaches
The indexed approach uses HashMap<Uuid, Vec<&Pago>> or similar pre-built index
The benchmark tests the most common query pattern (filter by contrato_id)
The benchmark accounts for index construction cost (not just query time in isolation)
Test data is generated at production scale (~5000 pagos)
The output discusses the amortization tradeoff: index build cost vs number of queries before rebuild
